stories.title: Follow live: Mbappé nets brace as France pile on
Sources: Raptors near deal to trade for Kawhi
stories.summary: The LA Clippers are nearing a deal to send Kawhi Leonard to the Toronto Raptors for Brandon Ingram, Gradey Dick, two first-round picks, one pick swap and two second-rounders, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Tuesday.

stories.title: LeBron tells Lakers he plans to play elsewhere
stories.summary: James has informed the Lakers that the franchise can move on without him because he will play elsewhere, Klutch Sports CEO Rich Paul told ESPN's Shams Charania on Tuesday.

stories.title: Serena falls in 3-set Wimbledon thriller in return...
stories.summary: Serena Williams, 44, was beaten 6-3, 6-7 (6) 6-3 by 20-year-old Maya Joint of Australia in her first professional singles match in nearly four years in the opening round of Wimbledon.

stories.title: Sorsby won't sue NFL, will prepare for '27 draft
stories.summary: The NFL Players Association and Brendan Sorsby will not be pursuing litigation after the NFL's decision not to hold a supplemental draft this year, according to a memo sent to all 32 teams.
